routingAcceptance: SDK task effect resolution must delegate routable task decisions through tasks-mux rather than direct agent-mux dispatch.
agent-platform CLI orchestration, including resolveAndPostEffect, must delegate routing decisions to tasks-mux.
Plugin stop-hook continuation must query tasks-mux before deciding host-agent delegation.
Internal responder effects must route to the agent-core path through tasks-mux.
Agent responder effects must route through AgentMuxResponderBackend.
Human responder effects must route through BreakpointBackend.
Tracker responder effects must route through ExternalTrackerBackend when configured, or produce explicit unavailable evidence when not configured.
Tests must prevent direct SDK or agent-platform bypass routing to agent-mux for task effects.
